header.title: Built for the teams running the company
header.description: Designed for professionals who manage shareholders, boards, incentive plans and operations every day.

items.title: Companies with many shareholders and corporate groups
items.pain: Outdated spreadsheets, manual certificates, ledgers in folders. Every corporate change means hours of work and risk of errors.
items.with: Official shareholder book in real time, individual records with full meeting history, instant certificate generation and a centralized repository accessible to all stakeholders.
items.case: AXA Agrupació Mutua centralizes the management of over 200,000 members with Sttok, saving hours of manual certificate and corporate process work.

items.title: Startups and scale-ups with incentive plans
items.pain: Phantom plans in spreadsheets, letters in Word, signatures by email, beneficiaries with no visibility on what they hold.
items.with: Phantom plans always up to date, invitation letters generated, beneficiary records configured and DocuSign signing in minutes. Each employee accesses their portal and sees their own holdings.
items.case: Factorial runs its global incentive plan for hundreds of employees on Sttok, saving hundreds of hours of plan administration.

items.title: Board Secretaries and shareholder meetings
items.pain: Notices by email, delegations on paper, quorums calculated by hand, minutes drafted after the fact.
items.with: One-click notice, digital delegations, automatic quorum calculation, electronic voting and instantly generated minutes.
items.case: PLD Space optimizes its meetings with multiple investor vehicles: centralized notices, delegations and votes, with zero manual tasks.

items.title: Corporate lawyers and advisors
items.pain: Every client with their own spreadsheet, folder and criteria. Impossible to scale beyond a handful of companies without losing track.
items.with: Multi-company dashboard for all your clients, full history, auto-generated documents and access portal for clients and their shareholders.
items.case: Corporate law firms across Spain centralize their clients' corporate management on Sttok. Zero spreadsheets, zero folders, always up to date.

items.title: In-house lawyers and legal departments
items.pain: Day-to-day corporate work is scattered across emails, spreadsheets and the external law firm. Little traceability and too much dependency on third parties.
items.with: The group's entire corporate life in a single platform: shareholder registry, meetings, boards and documentation, with full traceability and role-based access.
items.case: In-house legal teams of corporate groups centralize in Sttok the shareholder registry, meetings and documentation of all their companies.

items.title: Technology teams serving the legal department
items.pain: The legal department needs a tool, and the alternative is internal developments or shared spreadsheets nobody wants to maintain.
items.with: A market-standard solution, ISO 27001 and GDPR certified, with SSO, OTP access and dedicated instances. Deployed in a week with no maintenance debt.
items.case: IT teams roll out Sttok as the corporate standard for their legal and corporate departments, with security validated by their CISO.
